mapper.sql: id , title, brief, cover, content, click_num, like_num, comment_num, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_news (id, title, brief, cover, content, click_num, like_num, comment_num, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brief,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{likeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_news
id,
title,
brief,
cover,
content,
click_num,
like_num,
comment_num,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brief,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{clickNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{likeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_news
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brief = #{brief,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover = #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
click_num = #{clickNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
like_num = #{likeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comment_num = #{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_news set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brief = #{brief,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cover = #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, click_num = #{clickNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, like_num = #{likeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comment_num = #{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select count(id) from t_news
and title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
